---
layout: default
title: "Political Shifts and Legislative Hurdles in India"
date: 2026-07-12T04:05:51.541899+00:00
summary: "Major political realignments, legislative setbacks for women's reservation, and ongoing debates over electoral processes and judicial reforms dominate the news"
run_time_ist: "9:35AM"
---

<article class="digest-post">
  <a class="back-link" href="{{ '/' | relative_url }}">Political Brief</a>
  <p class="post-meta">Gemini Summary: 9:35AM</p>


<h2 class="section-title">India National Politics</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Political realignments:</strong> Three former TMC Rajya Sabha MPs have joined the BJP, while the TVK has allocated a Rajya Sabha seat to the Congress in Tamil Nadu.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I2</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMinwFBVV95cUxPQmZsWTRmdHROeFVNMHNlcFUtcl9naEY3YW4zOV9teHVOc0FYVDNSZzFHZFRoeUJJSzdKSl9EbFJoclFjNnhrMGktWTZEcFYwRzBjbDNVbTNFd0ctWkdreDNRclR4Y0s4ekh4SlNPMnhSTUxIS0tuR3dCUXh2TGN0SVlJR2RETExCVjFkREZHMVItV2lKaUdXRUVBSm96ZVU?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I6</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Legislative and judicial updates:</strong> The Constitutional Amendment Bill for women’s reservation has failed in the Lok Sabha, and the Chief Justice of India has urged Parliament to prioritize the Arbitration Council of India bill.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I1</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiqwFBVV95cUxPSTVKRHVGUXlhNjVqNEczYkNpd1NvbmRYOU5Fd2RIZjV3OHBob0owSzh3LVRXdUVqSDNVZTgtbVZlUG8ybS1wallfSVdTeTRtNENIU0lwV3piczdxV2NEVmE0WC1GSTQyMjR4dkNPb1pqblB2SzNHQjZBRWVXZHpPZXE2bVlQc3NGNEFJVU1NUHJMMFFqSkdRUVFFMGZNRUkzSTc0LXphM1JaLXM?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I4</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Electoral controversies:</strong> The Election Commission faces scrutiny from UN rapporteurs over the &quot;opaque&quot; voter registration process, even as it updates Form 6 to include parental details.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I3</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMi-?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I7</a></span></li>
</ul>

<h2 class="section-title">Policy and Institutions</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>International diplomacy:</strong> Prime Minister Modi has made history as the first Indian Prime Minister to address the Indonesian Parliament.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMipAFBVV95cUxPRmYzbEg0ejBQLWlrR0NTVXpGamRaTXZYQVVEUXNnNTdOY09FUFY1WTItYXI5VzZEbHdtSWVoT1FqMlhZQ3p0NWxHQ2FmbGJ1VnM2M3E5ZEwybVVoSXdPcDY2QkIxRmRwMGRtQ2EwVU03SHNYWFlxdzZqX2UxdjZ6X2pJZUtQbVd3cmhHYVpSZUxyS0ZwVmswU25TT1U2RWY1R3Z4bQ?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W1</a></span></li>
</ul>
